# Prompt Standards

## Purpose

Provide reusable prompt templates for repeatable engineering workflows.

## Standards

1. Start with the goal and required output format.
2. Include constraints (scope, safety, style).
3. Include acceptance criteria so results are verifiable.
4. Keep placeholders explicit: `[ISSUE_NUMBER]`, `[FEATURE_DESCRIPTION]`.
5. Keep prompts task-specific; avoid all-in-one prompts.
